nodes.name: W. E. Clyde Todd

nodes.name: Olive-green tyrannulet

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olive-green tyrannulet (Phylloscartes virescens) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, Guyana, and Suriname.Remsen, J
